items.title: Alibaba reports Q4 revenue up 3% YoY to ~$35.8B, below ~$36.3B est., and net income up ~100% to ~$3.7B, in part due to investments, as it seeks to monetize AI (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Alibaba reports Q4 revenue up 3% YoY to ~$35.8B, below ~$36.3B est., and net income up ~100% to ~$3.7B, in part due to investments, as it seeks to monetize AI (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Alibaba reports Q4 revenue up 3% YoY to ~$35.8B, below ~$36.3B est., and net income up ~100% to ~$3.7B, in part due to investments, as it seeks to monetize AI (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴报告称，第四季度收入同比增长 3% 至约 $35.8B，低于预期约 $36.3B，净利润增长约 100% 至约 $3.7B，部分原因是由于其寻求将人工智能货币化而进行的投资（Luz Ding/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 阿里巴巴报告称，第四季度收入同比增长 3% 至约 $35.8B，低于预期约 $36.3B，净利润增长约 100% 至约 $3.7B，部分原因是由于其寻求将人工智能货币化而进行的投资（Luz Ding/彭博社） / Alibaba reports Q4 revenue up 3% YoY to ~$35.8B, below ~$36.3B est., and net income up ~100% to ~$3.7B, in part due to investments, as it seeks to monetize AI (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)

items.title:
用藏师傅的 PPT Skill 让 Codex 配图的技巧

涉及到一些非常生僻的事实你怕 Codex 画的图有问题的时候，可以让他搜索相关图片，然后基于搜索的图片生成新的图片

items.title_en: The Facebook House in Los Altos, Mark Zuckerberg's former residence, has become a hub for Chinese AI talent, who are a key part of Silicon Valley's AI boom (Viola Zhou/Rest of World)
items.title_zh: 马克·扎克伯格故居洛斯阿尔托斯的 Facebook House 已成为中国人工智能人才的中心，他们是硅谷人工智能繁荣的关键组成部分（Viola Zhou/世界其他地区）
items.title_bilingual: 马克·扎克伯格故居洛斯阿尔托斯的 Facebook House 已成为中国人工智能人才的中心，他们是硅谷人工智能繁荣的关键组成部分（Viola Zhou/世界其他地区） / The Facebook House in Los Altos, Mark Zuckerberg's former residence, has become a hub for Chinese AI talent, who are a key part of Silicon Valley's AI boom (Viola Zhou/Rest of World)

items.title: Analysts say AI fervor in the US and Asia has spread to Europe, boosting stocks like STMicro and Nokia as investors seek the AI boom's pick-and-shovel stocks (Financial Times)
items.title_original: Analysts say AI fervor in the US and Asia has spread to Europe, boosting stocks like STMicro and Nokia as investors seek the AI boom's pick-and-shovel stocks (Financial Times)
items.title_en: Analysts say AI fervor in the US and Asia has spread to Europe, boosting stocks like STMicro and Nokia as investors seek the AI boom's pick-and-shovel stocks (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，美国和亚洲的人工智能热潮已蔓延至欧洲，投资者纷纷追捧人工智能热潮中的镐类股票，提振了意法半导体和诺基亚等股票（《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 分析师表示，美国和亚洲的人工智能热潮已蔓延至欧洲，投资者纷纷追捧人工智能热潮中的镐类股票，提振了意法半导体和诺基亚等股票（《金融时报》） / Analysts say AI fervor in the US and Asia has spread to Europe, boosting stocks like STMicro and Nokia as investors seek the AI boom's pick-and-shovel stocks (Financial Times)

items.title: An analysis of Tokenomist.ai data: Trump family members made ~$1.55B from sales of World Liberty Financial's WLFI tokens, lifting their total fortune by ~$660M (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: An analysis of Tokenomist.ai data: Trump family members made ~$1.55B from sales of World Liberty Financial's WLFI tokens, lifting their total fortune by ~$660M (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: An analysis of Tokenomist.ai data: Trump family members made ~$1.55B from sales of World Liberty Financial's WLFI tokens, lifting their total fortune by ~$660M (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 对 Tokenomist.ai 数据的分析：特朗普家族成员通过销售 World Liberty Financial 的 WLFI 代币赚取了约 1.55B 美元，使他们的总财富增加了约 6.6 亿美元（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 对 Tokenomist.ai 数据的分析：特朗普家族成员通过销售 World Liberty Financial 的 WLFI 代币赚取了约 1.55B 美元，使他们的总财富增加了约 6.6 亿美元（彭博社） / An analysis of Tokenomist.ai data: Trump family members made ~$1.55B from sales of World Liberty Financial's WLFI tokens, lifting their total fortune by ~$660M (Bloomberg)

items.title: China's CSI AI Index, which tracks AI supply chain companies, is up 28%+ YTD, while HK's Hang Seng Tech Index, which includes Alibaba and Tencent, is down 8% (William Sandlund/Financial Times)
items.title_original: China's CSI AI Index, which tracks AI supply chain companies, is up 28%+ YTD, while HK's Hang Seng Tech Index, which includes Alibaba and Tencent, is down 8% (William Sandlund/Financial Times)
items.title_en: China's CSI AI Index, which tracks AI supply chain companies, is up 28%+ YTD, while HK's Hang Seng Tech Index, which includes Alibaba and Tencent, is down 8% (William Sandlund/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 追踪人工智能供应链公司的中国中证人工智能指数今年迄今已上涨 28% 以上，而包括阿里巴巴和腾讯在内的香港恒生科技指数则下跌 8%（William Sandlund/《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 追踪人工智能供应链公司的中国中证人工智能指数今年迄今已上涨 28% 以上，而包括阿里巴巴和腾讯在内的香港恒生科技指数则下跌 8%（William Sandlund/《金融时报》） / China's CSI AI Index, which tracks AI supply chain companies, is up 28%+ YTD, while HK's Hang Seng Tech Index, which includes Alibaba and Tencent, is down 8% (William Sandlund/Financial Times)

items.title: Analysis: contract prices for NAND chips are up 600%+ since late September 2025, while those for DRAM chips are up ~400%, with analysts expecting further gains (Winnie Hsu/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Analysis: contract prices for NAND chips are up 600%+ since late September 2025, while those for DRAM chips are up ~400%, with analysts expecting further gains (Winnie Hsu/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Analysis: contract prices for NAND chips are up 600%+ since late September 2025, while those for DRAM chips are up ~400%, with analysts expecting further gains (Winnie Hsu/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 分析：自 2025 年 9 月下旬以来，NAND 芯片的合同价格上涨了 600% 以上，而 DRAM 芯片的合同价格上涨了约 400%，分析师预计还会进一步上涨（Winnie Hsu/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 分析：自 2025 年 9 月下旬以来，NAND 芯片的合同价格上涨了 600% 以上，而 DRAM 芯片的合同价格上涨了约 400%，分析师预计还会进一步上涨（Winnie Hsu/彭博社） / Analysis: contract prices for NAND chips are up 600%+ since late September 2025, while those for DRAM chips are up ~400%, with analysts expecting further gains (Winnie Hsu/Bloomberg)

items.title_zh: Config 正在为机器人基础模型构建数据层，以超过 2 亿美元的估值筹集了 2700 万美元种子资金，由三星风险投资 (Samsung Venture Investment) 领投（Kate Park/TechCrunch）
items.title_bilingual: Config 正在为机器人基础模型构建数据层，以超过 2 亿美元的估值筹集了 2700 万美元种子资金，由三星风险投资 (Samsung Venture Investment) 领投（Kate Park/TechCrunch） / Config, which is building a data layer for robotics foundation models, raised a $27M seed at a $200M+ valuation led by Samsung Venture Investment (Kate Park/TechCrunch)

items.title: Metis TechBio, a biotech company using AI to deliver and formulate drugs, surged as much as 185% in its Hong Kong market debut after raising ~$270M in its IPO (Amber Tong/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: Metis TechBio, a biotech company using AI to deliver and formulate drugs, surged as much as 185% in its Hong Kong market debut after raising ~$270M in its IPO (Amber Tong/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: Metis TechBio 是一家利用人工智能交付和配制药物的生物技术公司，在首次公开募股 (IPO) 中筹集了约 2.7 亿美元后，在香港市场首次亮相时股价飙升了 185%（Amber Tong/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: Metis TechBio 是一家利用人工智能交付和配制药物的生物技术公司，在首次公开募股 (IPO) 中筹集了约 2.7 亿美元后，在香港市场首次亮相时股价飙升了 185%（Amber Tong/彭博社） / Metis TechBio, a biotech company using AI to deliver and formulate drugs, surged as much as 185% in its Hong Kong market debut after raising ~$270M in its IPO (Amber Tong/Bloomberg)

items.title: Waymo recalls ~3,800 robotaxis in the US to fix software issues that may cause them to drive onto flooded roads, after some were seen stalled on flooded streets (Lora Kolodny/CNBC)

items.title_en: Waymo recalls ~3,800 robotaxis in the US to fix software issues that may cause them to drive onto flooded roads, after some were seen stalled on flooded streets (Lora Kolodny/CNBC)
items.title_zh: Waymo 在美国召回约 3,800 辆机器人出租车，以修复可能导致它们行驶到被洪水淹没的道路上的软件问题，此前有人看到其中一些机器人出租车停在被洪水淹没的街道上（Lora Kolodny/CNBC）
items.title_bilingual: Waymo 在美国召回约 3,800 辆机器人出租车，以修复可能导致它们行驶到被洪水淹没的道路上的软件问题，此前有人看到其中一些机器人出租车停在被洪水淹没的街道上（Lora Kolodny/CNBC） / Waymo recalls ~3,800 robotaxis in the US to fix software issues that may cause them to drive onto flooded roads, after some were seen stalled on flooded streets (Lora Kolodny/CNBC)

items.title: Princeton faculty votes to require proctoring in all in-person exams starting this summer, reversing an 1893 policy amid concerns about AI-fueled cheating (Douglas Belkin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: Princeton faculty votes to require proctoring in all in-person exams starting this summer, reversing an 1893 policy amid concerns about AI-fueled cheating (Douglas Belkin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: Princeton faculty votes to require proctoring in all in-person exams starting this summer, reversing an 1893 policy amid concerns about AI-fueled cheating (Douglas Belkin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 普林斯顿大学教师投票要求从今年夏天开始，所有现场考试都需要监考，扭转了 1893 年因担心人工智能引发的作弊而制定的政策（Douglas Belkin/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 普林斯顿大学教师投票要求从今年夏天开始，所有现场考试都需要监考，扭转了 1893 年因担心人工智能引发的作弊而制定的政策（Douglas Belkin/华尔街日报） / Princeton faculty votes to require proctoring in all in-person exams starting this summer, reversing an 1893 policy amid concerns about AI-fueled cheating (Douglas Belkin/Wall Street Journal)

items.title: Google DeepMind details a Gemini-powered mouse pointer that understands what it is pointing at, allowing users to perform tasks without using text-heavy prompts (Google DeepMind)
items.title_original: Google DeepMind details a Gemini-powered mouse pointer that understands what it is pointing at, allowing users to perform tasks without using text-heavy prompts (Google DeepMind)
items.title_en: Google DeepMind details a Gemini-powered mouse pointer that understands what it is pointing at, allowing users to perform tasks without using text-heavy prompts (Google DeepMind)
items.title_zh: Google DeepMind 详细介绍了一款由 Gemini 驱动的鼠标指针，它可以理解它所指向的内容，允许用户在不使用大量文本提示的情况下执行任务 (Google DeepMind)
items.title_bilingual: Google DeepMind 详细介绍了一款由 Gemini 驱动的鼠标指针，它可以理解它所指向的内容，允许用户在不使用大量文本提示的情况下执行任务 (Google DeepMind) / Google DeepMind details a Gemini-powered mouse pointer that understands what it is pointing at, allowing users to perform tasks without using text-heavy prompts (Google DeepMind)

比如你看到一张旅游截图，以前你得自己查地点、订酒店、记日历、搜攻略。
